hooks.command:
printf '
  [the curtain rises]
  The stage is set. The repository awaits its fate.
  Speak when ready. The audience is patient, for now.

'
echo '🎭 [curtain] our revels now are ended. the build holds. exeunt.'
echo '🎭 [Act III, the climax] thou dost push to main. there is no stage manager who can call this back.'
echo '🎭 [a death scene approaches] something is about to be deprecated. consider /death-scene before it goes.'
echo '🎭 [a force push] thou rewritest history. the chronicler notes it.'
echo '🎭 ✓ a scene committed to the cut.'
